price.text26: What is Brickly Real Estate Portal?
price.text27: Brickly is an all-in-one platform for the real estate and architectural sector. It connects brokers, agencies, developers and architects, and offers management tools, qualified leads and performance metrics.
price.text28: What is the difference between the Broker Plan and the Agency Plan?
price.text29: The Broker Plan is individual, ideal for a real estate advisor. The Agency Plan includes 5 profiles, team tools, lead assignment and corporate branding.
price.text30: Who owns the information I upload?
price.text31: You are the sole owner of your listings. Brickly only acts as a platform to showcase your inventory. We use general data and information in the system to create metrics that help you sell faster, but your private information is never sold to third parties.
price.text32: Does Brickly charge a commission on my closings?
price.text33: No, never. We are a technological platform, not a real estate agency. 100% of the commission you generate from your sales or rentals belongs exclusively to you. You only pay your monthly subscription to use our tools.
price.text34: How can I upload my properties?
price.text35: You have total flexibility: you can do it manually for detailed control of each property, or through bulk upload if you manage a large inventory of projects or agencies. You decide the method that best suits your workflow, ensuring your listings always look professional.

agent.text2: We connect you with the best advisors in the real estate sector
agent.text13: Frequently asked questions about agent search
agent.text14: At Brickly we want you to find the ideal real estate advisor quickly and easily. Our search tool allows you to filter by specialization, location, experience, and more. Below, we answer the most common questions so you can make the most of this section.
agent.text15: How does Brickly select the agents that are part of the network?
agent.text16: At Brickly, not just anyone can create a profile. Each agent goes through a validation process based on track record, transaction volume, reputation, and specialization. Our network is curated to guarantee high-level advice.
agent.text17: Where can I see the properties each agent has available for sale or rent?
agent.text18: When entering the agent's profile through the "VIEW PROFILE" button, you will find a section dedicated exclusively to the properties they currently manage, both for sale and for rent. You will be able to see photos, prices, location, and features of each property.
agent.text19: How can I contact an agent after viewing their profile?
agent.text20: Once you have reviewed the agent's profile and are interested in their services or a particular property, you could contact the agent directly through WhatsApp. By clicking the "Contact" button, a conversation will open where you can introduce yourself and make your inquiries immediately.
associate.text2:
The experts transforming the market are already associated with this platform. 
Discover who they are and what they offer.
terms.text3: We replace volume with value. Brickly Homes is a private real estate ecosystem designed for those who demand architecture, design, and real profitability above the saturation of the traditional market.
terms.text4: We understand that volume dilutes quality. That is why we apply rigorous selection filters based on architecture, location, and real value. Only properties that meet these standards are admitted, ensuring your portfolio stands out in an environment free of visual noise and advertising saturation.
terms.text5: Our platform connects verified brokers with an audience of high-profile investors and buyers seeking technical rigor and transparency. By joining Brickly Homes, you not only publish a property or a project, but you validate your brand's track record before the most demanding market in the country.
terms.text11: We prioritize quality over quantity. Each property goes through rigorous selection criteria focused on value, design, location, documentation, and long-term projection.
terms.text14: Design and aesthetics that elevate the visual standard of the urban environment.
terms.text16: Assets located exclusively in the highest value and demand nodes.
terms.text18: Price audit to ensure consistency with the premium segment.
terms.text20: High-quality visual material that maintains consistency with the premium segment.
terms.text22: Legal certainty verification to ensure secure transactions.
terms.text24: Backing of firms and builders with proven experience in the market.
terms.text26: Priority to unique pieces and pre-sales absent from mass portals.
terms.text28: Analysis based on real profitability and technical appreciation projection.
